qsv viz — chart gallery

Every chart type produced by qsv viz, from the sample datasets in examples/viz/. Generated with the viz feature; each chart is fully interactive.

Jump to a chart39 charts + data dictionary
smart (--smarter, geospatial) dashboardsmart (geographic outliers) dashboardsmart dashboardsmart (KPI gauges & target delta) dashboardsmart (--smarter) dashboardbarlinescatterscatter (bubble)scatter3dhistogramboxbox (grouped)violinpie (donut)heatmap (correlation)scatter (correlated pair)contourheatmap (pivot)candlestickohlcsankeyradartreemapsunbursticiclemapmap (density)geochoroplethchoropleth (US states)choropleth (MapLibre + GeoJSON)smart (time-series) dashboardsmart (per-US-state choropleth) dashboardsmart (--dictionary infer, treemap) dashboardsmart (--dictionary infer, sunburst) dashboardsmart (--dictionary infer, world choropleth) dashboardsmart (--smarter, committed --dictionary, NYC 311 metro choropleth) dashboardsmart (--smarter, curated --dictionary, region-code zip choropleth) dashboardPittsburgh 311 smart visual data dictionary
